studies.title: Evaluation of the effectiveness of an online-based support program for the treatment of depression (Novego®) - A randomized controlled trial

_verification.reason: The study is specifically about the digital therapeutic product 'Novego: Depressionen bewältigen', as evidenced by the product name appearing in the title and full text of the study. The intervention is clearly identified as the Novego program.

_classification.reason: The study is described as a randomized controlled trial, where 200 participants with depression are randomly allocated to either an intervention group or a waitlist control group. This randomization to isolate the treatment effect under controlled conditions is the defining feature of an RCT.

_classification.reason: The study is described as a randomized controlled trial, where participants are randomly assigned to either an intervention group or a waitlist control group, which is a defining feature of an RCT.

_classification.reason: The study involves randomization of participants into an intervention group and a waitlist control group, which is a defining feature of a randomized controlled trial.
